title: elymus trachycaulus subsp. stefanssonii
intro: Elymus trachycaulus subsp. stefanssonii, also known as Stefansson's wheatgrass or prairie wheatgrass, is a subspecies of grass native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help soothe digestive issues and promote overall health. The health benefits of Elymus trachycaulus subsp. stefanssonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support liver health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and holistic health practices.
